ogTitle: Kotara South vs Krambach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kotara South and Krambach.
heading: Kotara South vs Krambach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kotara South, New South Wales and Krambach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kotara South has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Krambach (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kotara South or Krambach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kotara South has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Krambach scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kotara South scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Krambach scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kotara South or Krambach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kotara South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
